reasoning: 386 hanabi festivals returned but all lack prefecture or English descriptions. Count is useful, but most entries are bare Japanese names with no dates, no location, no guidance for a foreign traveler wanting to pick one festival.
missing_data: Dates (month/week) and English descriptions are absent from nearly all items. Prefecture coverage is patchy — only a handful have prefecture_code populated.
improvement_hint: Enrich hanabi festival records with event dates and prefecture; surface top-ranked items (e.g. Sumida, Nagaoka) at the front of the list with full metadata.

reasoning: Identical corpus to L3-01 just in ja lang. Same structural weakness: 386 records, no dates, sparse prefectures. Japanese-language user arguably needs even more planning detail (specific venues + dates).
missing_data: Event dates, regional grouping, crowd/capacity hints all missing from most records.
improvement_hint: Ensure hanabi records have at minimum month and prefecture; allow filtering by month or region so Japanese query can surface actionable shortlist.

reasoning: Query is specifically for snow festivals in Hokkaido. Response returns 0 festivals for Hokkaido and falls back to national UNESCO intangible heritage items (none of which are snow festivals). The Sapporo Snow Festival is world-famous but completely absent.
missing_data: Sapporo Snow Festival, Asahikawa Winter Festival, and any Hokkaido-specific snow events are entirely absent. The fallback national_heritage data is irrelevant to the query.
improvement_hint: Add Hokkaido snow festival records (kind_tag: yuki_matsuri) to the festivals dataset; ensure fallback content is thematically relevant, not generic UNESCO art forms.

reasoning: User wants rural village life experience (田舎暮らし体験). get_japan_heritage returns heritage monuments (Nagoya Castle, Jo-an teahouse, etc.) — prestigious but urban/cultural, not rural homestay experiences. Query intent is misunderstood at tool selection level.
missing_data: Satoyama villages, agricultural stays, gassho-zukuri farmhouse experiences, rural DMO programs. No 田舎 or 農村 content surfaced.
improvement_hint: Add agrarian/rural-stay kind tags; route 'rural life' queries toward relevant DMO content and municipal scrape data for 農泊/satoyama experiences rather than heritage monuments.

reasoning: Korean query for autumn foliage returns 140 results including Kenroku-en, Momijidani Park, Matsumae Castle. Good coverage of named spots with coordinates and kind tags. Missing Korean translations and seasonal timing info reduces usefulness.
missing_data: Korean-language names and descriptions absent (name field stays in Japanese). No seasonal peak timing (mid-October–November) provided.
improvement_hint: Populate ko translations for top sakura/momiji spots; add autumn_foliage kind tag to allow filtering distinct from general outdoor spots.

reasoning: User explicitly wants 'not touristy' and 'quiet meditation'. Results include small temple (修行寺) and a ninja experience camp, neither matching contemplative retreat intent. 修行 matches ascetic training broadly but ninja experience and DMO event pages dominate.
missing_data: Zen retreat temples (sanzen, zazen programs), quiet mountain monasteries. Filter to distinguish tourism-activity '修行体験' from genuine contemplative venues.
improvement_hint: Add zazen/retreat kind tag; rank religious spots with low crowd_band higher for meditation-intent queries; exclude activity-event pages when intent is contemplative.

reasoning: Aurora borealis viewing in Japan is only rarely possible in Hokkaido during strong solar events. Response returns observatories, national parks (Okinawa), and a ropeway — none actually address aurora viewing. The query should be gently redirected or answered with accurate rarity info.
missing_data: Hokkaido aurora viewing spots (Rikubetsu, Tsurui, Shiretoko) with best-chance guidance; caveat that auroras are rare in Japan.
wrong_data: Okinawa national parks and unrelated outdoor spots are completely off-topic for aurora viewing.
improvement_hint: Add aurora_viewing kind tag for Hokkaido spots known for dark skies; surface a caveat that Japan aurora sightings are rare and limited to northern Hokkaido.

reasoning: Query asks for 100-year-old houses to sleep in (古民家 accommodation). get_hotels(Gifu) returns onsen ryokan and generic hotels. Gifu has famous 合掌造り gassho-zukuri farmhouses in Shirakawa-go but these don't appear. Constraint of historic building type is not handled.
missing_data: Gassho-zukuri farmhouse inns in Shirakawa-go (e.g. 五箇山, 白川郷), machiya inns. No lodging type=kominka in the results.
improvement_hint: Add lodging_type=kominka/gassho/machiya and surface age or heritage_building flag; filter hotels by historic_building designation when query implies architectural character.

reasoning: Thai query asks for non-touristy places. 桜 search returns 215 results including famous spots (Kenroku-en, Himeji Castle) which are very crowded — opposite of requested 穴場 (hidden gem). No crowd-avoidance filtering applied. Thai translations absent.
missing_data: Low-crowd sakura spots; no Thai-language name translations present; seasonal timing missing.
improvement_hint: Use crowd_band=low filter when query signals 穴場/uncrowded preference; ensure Thai translations are populated for top cherry blossom spots.

reasoning: Photography / dramatic landscape query. 絶景 returns 53 results including editorial DMO route pages from Ehime, Niigata. Useful leads with URLs but mostly as article links rather than named discrete spots. Photography-specific attributes absent.
missing_data: Named specific viewpoints (e.g. Tottori Sand Dunes, Mt Fuji views, Hitachi Seaside Park). Most results are DMO article pages, not pinned locations with coordinates.
improvement_hint: Tag specific panoramic viewpoints with zekkei/scenic_viewpoint kind; favour results with coordinates over editorial article pages for location-intent photography queries.

reasoning: Arabic query for outdoor hot springs (not hotels). search_area 露天風呂 returns 72 results with named onsen facilities (宝泉坊, 祓川温泉, etc.) with good descriptions. Partially addresses the 'not in hotels' constraint by including day-trip facilities. Arabic translations absent.
missing_data: Arabic translations completely absent. 'Wild' natural rotemburo vs hotel rotemburo distinction not made — results still include hotel facilities.
improvement_hint: Populate Arabic translations for key onsen spots; add natural_rotemburo flag distinguishing wild-access from hotel-adjacent baths.

reasoning: Wild dolphin swimming query. Top result is a Kyoto cultural ambassador page with no dolphin connection. Second result is Noto aquarium (captive dolphins). Actual wild dolphin swimming sites (Mikura-jima, Amami Oshima) are buried or absent.
missing_data: Mikurajima wild dolphin swim experience (famous and bookable), Amami wild dolphin tours. These key sites are absent from top results.
wrong_data: First result (Kyoto tourism ambassador) is entirely irrelevant noise.
improvement_hint: Add wild_dolphin_swim kind tag for Mikurajima and Amami; improve ranking to surface activity-specific content over generic text-matched noise.

reasoning: Query asks for traditional architecture untouched by modernization — pointing to 重伝建 (Judenken) preservation districts. get_japan_heritage returns Nihon Isan stories (heritage narratives), not Judenken districts. Tool mismatch — the tool_scope_note actually warns about this.
missing_data: Judenken (重要伝統的建造物群保存地区) districts like Tsumago, Shirakawa-go, Gion Shimbashi. These are exactly what's wanted but this tool doesn't surface them.
improvement_hint: Route 'traditional architecture / preserved townscape' queries to search_area with preservation_district kind tag, or add a dedicated get_preservation_districts tool.

reasoning: Vietnamese query for Ainu culture in Hokkaido. Excellent result: top hits are National Ainu Museum, Ainu Museum (Porotokotan), Nibutani Ainu Culture Museum — all in Hokkaido, all highly relevant, with coordinates and visit times. Minor gap: no Vietnamese translations.
missing_data: Vietnamese (vi) translations absent from name fields. Upopoy national site (重要) is present as Q116872384 but without distinguishing description.
improvement_hint: Populate Vietnamese translations for Ainu museum records; add note distinguishing old Ainu Museum (closed) from National Ainu Museum (Upopoy, opened 2020).

reasoning: Cliff-carved Buddhist statue query. Excellent hit: Usuki Stone Buddhas (National Treasure) at top, Oya-dera, Komasaka, Kiyomizu Magaibutsu — all directly relevant 磨崖仏 sites with heritage designations and coordinates. Strong intent match and factual accuracy.
missing_data: Visit duration and access info sparse for some sites. English descriptions null for several entries.
improvement_hint: Enrich magaibutsu records with English descriptions and practical access notes (nearest station); add magaibutsu kind tag explicitly.

reasoning: Query asks for day-trip volcano hikes from Tokyo. Response returns volcanoes nationwide (Iwate, Unzen, Towada, Oga) — far too distant for day trips. Mt Fuji appears but without day-trip feasibility context. No geographic proximity filtering applied.
missing_data: Day-trip feasible volcanic hikes from Tokyo: Mt Fuji (with seasonal caveat), Mt Mitake, Hakone Owakudani, Izu Oshima. Distance and access time from Tokyo entirely absent.
improvement_hint: Implement geographic proximity filtering when 'from city' constraint is specified; surface transit time to Tokyo for each result to enable day-trip feasibility assessment.

reasoning: Indonesian query for temple tofu-making experience. Results return frozen tofu GI products, island tofu stories, mountain tofu shops — none are explicitly temple-based tofu experiences. Koya-san shojin ryori tofu experience is absent.
missing_data: Koya-san (Kongobu-ji area) shojin ryori / temple tofu experience; temple restaurant designations. The 'at a temple' constraint is not addressed.
improvement_hint: Add temple_food / shojin_ryori kind tag; link tofu and food-craft content to nearby religious sites so agent can compose temple + food responses.

reasoning: Query for 'fishing villages frozen in time'. Results include sakuraebi fishing port food article, Itoman fishing port (Okinawa), market street, and a closed-access warning notice. Missing atmospheric preserved fishing villages like Ine-no-Funaya or Wajima.
missing_data: Ine-no-Funaya (伊根の舟屋, Kyoto), Wajima (Noto), Kesennuma, or other visually distinctive preserved fishing villages. The 'frozen in time' nuance entirely unaddressed.
wrong_data: The 白浜漁港 entry is a 'no entry' notice — not a tourist destination.
improvement_hint: Tag historic/preserved fishing villages with fishing_village + preservation_district kinds; exclude administrative-notice pages from tourism results.

reasoning: Query for washi paper-making experience. Response returns all 231 METI craft items starting with Ainu textiles and silk — correct category but washi (Japanese paper) is not in the visible top results. Washi is a major METI craft but buried below textile entries.
missing_data: Washi entries (Echizen washi, Mino washi, Kurotani washi) should rank highly. Experience/workshop venues (where to actually learn) are absent — only product designations returned.
improvement_hint: Filter or rank craft results by query keyword; for experience-intent queries, surface municipal scrape / DMO data linking to actual workshop venues alongside METI designations.

reasoning: Period-drama landscape query. 宿場 search returns Tsumago-juku, Narai-juku, Seki-juku with preservation_district + shukuba kinds and IPDT heritage designations. Very good intent match with named post-towns. Detailed DMO article pages add practical depth.
missing_data: Edo-period streetscapes beyond post-towns (e.g. Kurashiki Bikan, Gion, Higashiyama) could enrich; opening hours and access info sparse for some entries.
improvement_hint: Surface a broader range of period-drama streetscape types (merchant towns, castle towns) beyond shukuba to fully satisfy 時代劇ロケ地 intent.

reasoning: Non-crowded beaches query. Results lead with Naminoue Beach (Naha city, urban beach), followed by several Okinawa beaches. No filtering on crowd_band=low applied. Okinawa beaches are generally very popular. The 'not crowded' constraint is ignored.
missing_data: Low-crowd mainland beaches (e.g. San'in coast, Tohoku coast, remote island beaches). All top results have crowd_band=medium and are well-known tourist beaches.
improvement_hint: Apply crowd_band=low filter by default when query signals uncrowded preference; surface beaches from less-visited prefectures (Aomori, Tottori, Shimane).

reasoning: Local izakaya alley query. 横丁 returns 74 results but top hit is a Shinagawa park (横丁公園), second is a Saga tourism page in Chinese. Authentic izakaya alleys (Omoide Yokocho, Harmonica Yokocho, Nonbei Yokocho) are probably in dataset but buried under noise.
missing_data: Named iconic izakaya alleys: Omoide Yokocho (Tokyo), Harmonica Yokocho (Kichijoji), Shinsekai (Osaka). These should rank first.
wrong_data: 横丁公園 is a park, not an izakaya alley. Saga tourism page in Chinese is irrelevant noise.
improvement_hint: Improve kind tag granularity: izakaya_alley vs park both tagged yokocho. Promote attraction-type yokocho with real izakaya context above park-type results.

reasoning: German query for rural train travel. ローカル線 returns Sagano Scenic Line, Oigawa Main Line, and Nagano art-trip editorial content — all relevant. Good local_railway kind match. Missing: German translations, timetable/access info, and iconic scenic lines like Iiyama or Ôu.
missing_data: German (de) translations absent. Iconic scenic rural lines (飯山線, 大糸線, 三陸鉄道) with landscape description missing. No access/booking info.
improvement_hint: Populate German translations for top local_railway attractions; add scenic_railway kind tag and highlight lines with dramatic landscapes or heritage steam trains.

reasoning: Firefly viewing query. Results include Hotaruka firefly squid (off-topic), ホタルの里 park, designated natural monument sites, Firefly Museum, and Toyoda boat ride event (excellent!). Mix is reasonable but the squid site is misleading as a top result.
missing_data: Specific viewing season (June) not surfaced. More designated firefly habitat sites across western Japan would improve coverage. Viewing event calendars absent.
wrong_data: ホタルイカ群遊海面 (firefly squid, not firefly) ranks first — a confusing mismatch for an English user searching 'hotaru'.
improvement_hint: Separate hotaru (firefly, 蛍) from hotaru-ika (firefly squid, ホタルイカ) at the kind-tag level; surface firefly-specific venues at top for summer-intent queries.

reasoning: Russian query for winter crane watching. Top result is Izumi crane migration grounds (Kagoshima) — the world's largest red-crowned crane wintering site, directly matching the query with rich description, coordinates, Ramsar designation. Kushiro wetlands also present. Good result.
missing_data: Russian (ru) translations absent. Viewing timing (October–March) not surfaced. Kushiro-shitsugen could be more prominently featured alongside Izumi.
improvement_hint: Populate Russian translations for top bird-watching sites; add winter_wildlife / crane_wintering kind tag and seasonal window metadata to help agent compose actionable travel answer.
